channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Driverless 'bus of the future' is tested in Barcelona
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Commuters in downtown Barcelona have been able to ride the bus for free this week. There’s just one catch: this mini-bus has no one at the wheel.
item.dc:creator: HERNAN MUÑOZ and JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: FBI warns of dangerous new ‘smishing' scam targeting your phone
item.description: Hackers have set up over 10,000 fake websites to keep smishing scams going and target both iPhone and Android users with texts. Kurt the CyberGuy shares how to defend yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft’s Patch Tuesday updates: Keeping up with the latest fixes
item.description: Long before Taco Tuesday became part of the pop-culture vernacular, Tuesdays were synonymous with security — and for anyone in the tech world, they still are.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Sly Tricks for Python: Setting Up on Air-Gapped Machine, Snappier Code with Async, and More
item.description: Learn about setting up Python on an air-gapped machine, snappier code with async, faster programs with Zig, and slicker web apps with HTMX and Django in this week's Python Report.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: GitLab has patched a host of worrying security issues
item.description: Among the problems were two critical severity issues which allowed threat actors to bypass authentication.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Apple Music Classical is now available on the web, but its Mac app is still nowhere in sight
item.description: Apple Music Classical has expanded once again and is now available online, but you'll have to wait longer for its native Mac app.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: The future of AI isn’t the model—it’s the system
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Google signals support for app store age verification law with changes
item.description: Google is pushing back against other major technology companies' efforts to put the responsibility of age verification on the app stores, arguing the onus is on both the stores and developers to boost children's safety.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Dangerous Chrome extensions mimic password managers
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy explains how to protect yourself from malicious Chrome extensions that can steal sensitive information like password managers, crypto wallets and banking apps.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Majority of Americans have used AI models like ChatGPT: Survey
item.description: A majority of Americans have used ChatGPT-like artificial intelligence (AI) models according to a new survey.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: How to deliver more secure capabilities to the warfighter, faster
item.description: Rethinking the delivery process for new capabilities is essential to put cybersecurity and the warfighter front and center. The post How to deliver more secure capabilities to the warfighter, faster first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Trump says TikTok deal is in the works. Here's where things stand with the company
item.description: In less than a month, TikTok could have one or a few new owners, be banned again, or simply receive another reprieve to continue operating in the United States.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Go-based TypeScript to dramatically improve speed, scalability
item.description: Microsoft is developing a native TypeScript implementation based on Google’s Go language. The initiative promises dramatic improvements in editor startup speed, build times, and memory usage, making it easier to scale TypeScript to large code bases, Microsoft said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Elon Musk claims X being targeted in 'massive cyberattack' as service goes down
item.description: Hours after a series of outages Monday that left X unavailable to thousands of users, Elon Musk claimed that the social media platform was being targeted in a “massive cyberattack.” “We get attacked every day, but this was done with a lot of resources," Musk claimed in a post.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How the Futures Command is helping Army to envision NGC2
item.description: Joe Welch, the deputy to the commanding general of the Army Futures Command, said the characteristics of need helps define the problem set for industry. The post How the Futures Command is helping Army to envision NGC2 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Fortran, Delphi rise in Tiobe popularity index
item.description: Older programming languages such as Fortran and Delphi are making a comeback, based on the results of this month’s Tiobe index of language popularity. Tiobe attributes their rise to the need to maintain vital legacy systems still dependent on them.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Is that iPhone app spying? Apple’s App Privacy Report reveals all
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson urges you to use Apple’s App Privacy Report to see what your apps are really up to.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Transferring data from old laptop to new one
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson talks about how to smoothly transfer your data from an old laptop to a new one using cloud storage or external drives.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How genomics and AI could help treat cancer more effectively
item.description: “These discoveries highlight how genetic profiling can play a crucial role in personalizing cancer care,” Ruishan Liu said in a news release.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation
